check_instruction: Find primary stat/video page and one contract/access source before assigning a manual grade.
Record salary, option, buyout, transfer, club-control, and agent uncertainty as text evidence.
Check injury, rehab, IL, recent workload, pitch count, role continuity, and current availability.
Grade swing decision, contact floor, two-strike survival, OF/DH role, defense, and baserunning fit.
Grade pitch mix, command under traffic, HR/BB damage shape, starter runway, and role willingness.
Compare manual notes against KBO archetype and failure-risk rules before any unlock discussion.
Write continue or kill reason, but keep recommendation locked until all gates pass.
